title: My crazy theory as to the real reason the pilots are horrid
display_title: My crazy theory as to the real reason the pilots are horrid
wikitext:
[]: My crazy theory as to the real reason the pilots are horrid.             Quote Post by Smash Genesis » Thu Jul 07, 2011 11:34 pm Okay, so I was watching End of Evangelion a while back, right? Well, in Episode 26', Giant Naked Rei takes the form of Kaworu to weak Shinji's AT Field because he trusts Kaworu. This got me thinking... According to Kaworu, the AT Field is what seperates every mind and soul from one another, and gives Lilim physical form, right? Well, some people have, as a result, surmised that Angels are some of the loneliest beings in existence given their ability to project their AT Field as a shield and weapon. Well, think for a moment. How do people interact and become close? At first, the are distant from each other, but as time goes on, they become closer and more comfortable letting each other in more. Now, think for a moment? What are the two most effective ways to penetrate an AT Field? A Spear of Longinus, and another AT Field. I'm sure most of you have figured out where this is going, but for those who haven't... We all have AT Fields. AT Fields cancel each other out. As shown in Episode 26' being around someone you trust weakens your AT Field dramatically. Therefore, the reason two AT Fields neutralize each other is because it is a way of making friends with the Angel. That's right. You aren't mind raping it. You're befriending it. You're befriending one of the loneliest creatures in the universe. And when Shinji, Rei and Asuka do this, they kill them every time. The monsters.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Jul 07, 2011 11:37 pm Given the direct physical pain and horror incurred for the pilots every time an angel penetrates their AT Field, I don't think this really holds up.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Fri Jul 08, 2011 1:28 am esselfortium wrote: Given the direct physical pain and horror incurred for the pilots every time an angel penetrates their AT Field, I don't think this really holds up.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Jul 08, 2011 2:17 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Fri Jul 08, 2011 3:06 am Seele00TextOnly wrote: I think she does that to get them to lower their own AT field; with it weakened she easily obliterates it at the point of their acceptance. Perhaps she does it that way to be nice; she certainly doesn't seem to have to do it that way, as we see with Aoba. (I guess she didn't want to turn into a guitar.)

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Jul 08, 2011 3:10 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jul 08, 2011 4:09 am esselfortium wrote: Given the direct physical pain and horror incurred for the pilots every time an angel penetrates their AT Field, I don't think this really holds up.

[]: Re: My crazy theory as to the real reason the pilots are hor             Quote Post by gwern » Fri Jul 08, 2011 9:05 pm Smash Genesis wrote: That's right. You aren't mind raping it. You're befriending it. You're befriending one of the loneliest creatures in the universe. And when Shinji, Rei and Asuka do this, they kill them every time. The monsters.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Jul 09, 2011 1:47 pm I think that's a rather twisted interpretation of events, personally. Angels want to reunite with Adam to create more of their kind? Check. Makes perfect sense. Angels do things like ransacking peoples' minds or physically invading them just to say "hi"? Yeah, about that...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 21, 2011 12:20 pm Tangent split to here .
